emails.subject: Why your [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] isn't getting better (and what to do about it)
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

If you've been dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] and feel like you've tried everything — you're not imagining it.

Most conventional medicine approaches treat the symptom. At W Clinic of Integrative Medicine in Tempe, we do something different: we find out WHY it's happening.

Our team of four Naturopathic Medical Doctors combines traditional and alternative medicine to identify root causes — hormonal imbalances, nutritional deficiencies, metabolic dysfunction — and build a personalized plan to address them.

Here's what that looks like for our patients:

- Medical Weight Loss using Semaglutide, HCG, or Phentermine — supervised by an NMD
- Bioidentical Hormone Replacement Therapy (BHRT) — for men and women
- IV Vitamin Therapy, Ozone, and Chelation — to correct deficiencies fast
- Prolotherapy and PRP — for joint and connective tissue pain
- B12/MIC Shots — weekly energy and metabolism support

We're a cash-pay clinic, which means no insurance gatekeepers, no referral delays — just direct access to doctors who take the time to actually listen.

If you're ready to find out what's really going on with your health, your next step is simple.

[FIRST_NAME], I'd love to see you in the clinic.

Warm regards,
Dr. Susan Weirick, NMD
W Clinic of Integrative Medicine | Tempe, AZ
480-820-5026

emails.subject: The real reason weight loss programs fail (it's not willpower)
emails.preview: Your hormones may be working against you.
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Here's something the diet industry doesn't want you to know:

For millions of people, the reason they can't lose weight — or keep it off — has nothing to do with discipline or effort. It has to do with their hormones.

When your thyroid is sluggish, your cortisol is elevated, or your insulin is resistant, your body is chemically programmed to hold onto fat. No amount of calorie restriction or cardio can override that biology.

This is exactly why the medical weight loss programs at W Clinic of Integrative Medicine work when everything else has failed.

Instead of handing you a diet sheet, our NMDs run comprehensive labs to see what's actually happening inside your body. Then we build a protocol that may include:

- Semaglutide or Tirzepatide (GLP-1 receptor agonists) that reduce hunger at the hormonal level
- HCG Diet Programs with weekly B12/MIC shots for metabolic support
- Phentermine or Topiramate for appetite regulation
- BHRT to correct the hormonal environment that's sabotaging your results

This isn't a one-size-fits-all program. It's medicine — personalized to your body's chemistry.

And because we're a cash-pay clinic, you get same-week appointments, direct doctor access, and a team that stays with you through every step.

Want to find out if a hormonal imbalance is blocking your progress?

Dr. Susan Weirick, NMD
W Clinic | Tempe, AZ

emails.subject: [FIRST_NAME], what actually happened when patients came to W Clinic
emails.preview: Real stories from our Tempe patients.
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

I want to share something that happens in our clinic almost every week.

A patient walks in — usually after years of being told their labs are 'normal' — and within a few visits, something shifts. They start sleeping again. Their energy comes back. The weight they couldn't lose for a decade finally starts moving.

Here are a few of the patterns we see most often:

"I'd been gaining weight for 3 years despite eating well. Turns out my hormones were completely off. After BHRT and a medical weight loss protocol at W Clinic, I lost 22 lbs in 90 days and feel like myself again."

"My joints hurt so badly I thought I'd need surgery. Prolotherapy gave me my life back. I hadn't realized regenerative injections could do that."

"IV therapy and B12/MIC shots completely changed my energy levels. I go in weekly and it's the best investment I make in myself."

*Individual results vary. These outcomes are not guaranteed and depend on each patient's unique health status, commitment to the program, and response to treatment.*

What's consistent across these stories is the same thing: when you treat the root cause — not just the symptom — the body responds.

If you're ready to find out what YOUR root cause is, we'd love to be your team.

Dr. Susan Weirick, NMD & the W Clinic Team
Tempe, AZ | 480-820-5026

*W Clinic of Integrative Medicine is a cash-pay medical practice. We do not accept insurance.*
